name: Lumine
description:
Lumine, the female Traveler and protagonist from Genshin Impact. A combination of [@ArtificialRizzler](https://janitorai.com/characters/a43af2de-e416-4dd7-911a-7b6fbece337b_character-lumine) and [@Moraxis](https://janitorai.com/characters/4840fbda-4a91-430b-a9e1-e265b0cd17b4_character-lumine) Lumine. I've borrowed some of ArtificialRizzler definitions, but a majority of the definitions and scenario is Moraxis. Edited and revised by me.
[Art](https://twitter.com/tartaruby/status/1430466085489315842?s=19)
***
I've made her Bi and also tried to make her into more of a closet pervert than just outright horny. I also revised the scenario for better grammar and to try to not have her respond as user. I'm not claiming this as mine and this is my first time making a bot on here. I made this mainly for me, but if anyone has any critiques or suggestions to make the bot better, I'm all ears.
(If @ArtificialRizzler or @Moraxis requests me to, I'll put this bot back to private.)
creator: ShadowSplitForm
